assertions.title: Full happy path (load → compare → filter → export)

steps.observed: Configuration step rendered with loaded file metadata.

steps.action: Select key columns + auto-pair and run comparison
steps.expected: Results render with non-zero match rate
steps.observed: Results step rendered with 40% match rate (2 of 5).
Mismatches filter active with 1 row shown.

steps.expected: CSV download works and header matches selected setup
steps.observed: CSV downloaded and parsed; header includes Result, Key: id, File A and File B mapped columns.

evidence.network: Observed POST /api/sessions/{sid}/files/a, POST /files/b, POST /mappings, POST /compare, GET /export in flow session.

assertions.title: Pair-order round-trip (save → reset → reload → restore → compare)

steps.action: Create manual mapping and save pair order
steps.observed: pair-order file downloaded and contains saved key/comparison selections.
Baseline summary: 40% match rate, totals 5 rows (2 matches, 1 mismatch, 1 only-in-B, 1 only-in-A).

steps.action: Reset, reload same files, load saved pair-order
steps.observed: Restored chips match pre-reset mapping order and selections.

steps.expected: Match-rate and totals identical to baseline
steps.observed: Restored compare produced same 40% and identical totals.

evidence.network: Observed POST /pair-order/save and POST /pair-order/load for the round-trip session.

steps.expected: Snapshot file download in v2 format
steps.observed: Downloaded snapshot JSON has version: 2 and expected top-level keys.

steps.expected: Read-only results render and match saved results
steps.observed: Read-only banner shown; loaded summary remains 40% and same totals.
Compare request count stayed 7 before/after read-only interactions.
Returned to file-selection step with empty dropzones.

evidence.network: Observed comparison-snapshot save/load requests; compare count unchanged during read-only interactions (7 -> 7).

steps.observed: Configuration step rendered with headers id/name/total/email vs id/full_name/total_amount/email.

steps.expected: High-confidence pairs pre-populated; lower-confidence remain unmapped
steps.observed: Auto-pair selected id, name/full_name, email; total/total_amount remained unselected.

steps.action: Manually map remaining low-confidence pair and run compare
steps.observed: After selecting total/total_amount manually, compare executed and results rendered.

evidence.network: Auto-pair invoked from configuration flow; subsequent compare succeeded after manual completion.

steps.observed: Error banner displayed: "Failed to parse CSV bytes: Row 3 has 2 columns, expected 3 columns".
Error banner cleared; File A card loaded with row/column summary.

steps.action: Complete flow with valid File B and run compare
steps.observed: Comparison results rendered successfully.

evidence.network: Malformed upload produced UI error state; subsequent valid uploads and compare requests completed.

steps.observed: csv-align-theme and <html>.class/style.colorScheme toggled correctly to light then dark.

steps.action: Run load → compare → filter → export in dark mode
steps.expected: Dark theme remains active through workflow
steps.observed: Workflow completed with dark palette and dark-mode toggle state retained.
After reload checks, localStorage remained "dark" and <html> retained dark class/color-scheme.

evidence.network: Workflow API calls completed in dark mode; reload checks performed while maintaining dark theme state.

steps.observed: Step 2 shown with partial key selection.

steps.expected: Return to step 1 with locked step 2/3 and empty inputs
steps.observed: Returned to step 1 with empty File A/B selectors and initial nav state.
Pre-reset file-upload session ID 8b17008c-ca5f-4646-b117-5e9e3d0f3454; post-reset upload used 26b1c366-292c-4ab1-abf6-8b3e00b9c5d2.

evidence.network: Session ID changed after reset on next upload request (old != new).

assertions.title: Step navigation lock integrity after snapshot load

steps.action: In snapshot read-only mode, click step 1/2 headers
steps.observed: Remained on read-only results; step-click attempts did not navigate away.
Returned to step 1 file-selection surface.

steps.expected: Step 2 unlocks on two files; step 3 unlocks only after summary
steps.observed: After two files loaded, step 2 active while step 3 remained locked; after compare, step 3 unlocked and active.

evidence.network: No compare call triggered by read-only step-click attempts; compare resumed only after starting a new comparison and running workflow.

frictions.description: Reloading during theme checkpoints returned UI to step 1, so files had to be reloaded to continue end-to-end workflow checks.
frictions.resolution: Re-loaded fixtures and resumed flow; theme persistence evidence still captured via localStorage + <html>.dark checks.

frictions.description: File selectors are hidden inputs with dynamic IDs, so direct upload to visible dropzone/button refs fails.
frictions.resolution: Targeted underlying file inputs by selector each time and continued validation normally.

summary: Tested 8 assigned cross-area assertions: 8 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked.
